---
pagetitle: "Vivek Srikrishnan — CV"
---

{{< cv-header >}}

# Research Interests {.unnumbered}

{{< cv-section interests >}}

# Appointments {.unnumbered}

{{< cv-section appointments >}}

# Education {.unnumbered}

{{< cv-section education >}}

# Publications {.unnumbered}

## Peer-Reviewed Journal Articles {.unnumbered}

{{< cv-bibliography papers >}}

## Articles Under Review or Forthcoming {.unnumbered}

{{< cv-bibliography inpress >}}

## Reports {.unnumbered}

{{< cv-bibliography reports >}}

## Books {.unnumbered}

{{< cv-bibliography books >}}

## Conference Proceedings {.unnumbered}

{{< cv-bibliography conferences >}}

## Conference Presentations {.unnumbered}

{{< cv-bibliography talks >}}

## Conference Posters {.unnumbered}

{{< cv-bibliography posters >}}

# Invited Talks {.unnumbered}

{{< cv-section talks >}}

# Grants and Contracts {.unnumbered}

{{< cv-section grants >}}

# Networks and Projects {.unnumbered}

{{< cv-section projects >}}

# Teaching {.unnumbered}

{{< cv-section teaching >}}

# Advising {.unnumbered}

{{< cv-section advising >}}

# Committee Member {.unnumbered}

{{< cv-section committee >}}

# Awards {.unnumbered}

{{< cv-section awards >}}

# Outreach {.unnumbered}

{{< cv-section outreach >}}

# Service {.unnumbered}

{{< cv-section service >}}

# Professional Experience {.unnumbered}

{{< cv-section experience >}}
